---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Coulthard"
---

## The Rev. Thomas Coulthard

**Dates:** (b. 1818/19)

### Description

uncle of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

He lived in Plymstock, and was trustee of the marriage settlement of Julian Bargus Yonge and his niece Emma Frances Walter [WDRO MS]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
